payload.answer: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performing model choice remain open.
payload.decision: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is intended to be a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is intended to be a strict memory intake agent. Whether Telegram should be added later and which model is cheapest while saturating performance remain open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No prior entity mapping was provided, and the summary does not require resolving aliases or merging entities.

payload.intent: Extract durable architectural memory cards from the chat summary, preserving unresolved questions as open items rather than decisions.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for memory.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the source of truth.
Slack should act as a strict memory intake agent.
Whether Telegram should be added later is unresolved.
Which model is cheapest while still saturating performance is unresolved.

details: Preserved 2 unresolved questions as open items.

repair_options: If Telegram is later decided on, add it as a separate intake/source channel with explicit role and precedence rules.
If model benchmarking data is available, store the cheapest model that meets the performance threshold as a durable decision.
